data.title: Analysis: The Fed is not as hawkish as expected; the rate-cutting cycle continues.
data.description: The Federal Reserve signaled this week that it is open to further rate cuts in 2026, a move welcomed by investors. Markets had previously braced themselves for a "hawkish" rate cut—lowering the benchmark federal funds rate—while strongly hinting at a reluctance to make further adjustments. U.S. stocks rose along with bonds, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average climbing nearly 650 points (1.3%) on Thursday, hitting a record high. Despite internal divisions within the Fed and mixed signals released on Wednesday, many still see signs that even a slight further weakening in the labor market could prompt the central bank to cut rates again in the coming months. The Fed's announcement that it will expand its balance sheet by purchasing short-term Treasury securities, a move aimed at easing recent pressures in the overnight lending market, also encouraged investors. Investors expect the Fed to be significantly different next year, with Trump beginning final interviews this week with potential successors to Powell. (Jinshi)

data.title: Gate Research: Bollinger Bands performed exceptionally well among various momentum indicators for BTC in 2025.
data.description: A recent research report from Gate Research, titled "Application and Backtesting of Momentum Indicators in the Crypto Market," points out that from the end of 2024 to 2025, the BTC market entered a structural phase characterized by high volatility and weak trends, with price movements exhibiting a mixed pattern of "range-bound oscillation + volatility expansion." In this context, traditional trend-following momentum strategies frequently fail during these common phases, while momentum structures centered on volatility expansion demonstrate greater adaptability. Therefore, Bollinger Band breakout momentum is more effective at capturing market movements than MACD and RSI. As the overall market gradually transitions from a "trend-driven" to a "volatility-dominated" trading paradigm, the environmental fit of momentum strategies becomes a core factor determining performance. Gate Research notes that in a market environment characterized by unstable trends and frequent volatility, a single momentum indicator is unlikely to be effective in the long run. A more robust composite momentum framework can be constructed by introducing ADX as a trend filter, combining it with Bollinger Bands to capture volatility expansion, and supplementing it with RSI to identify extreme sentiment ranges.

data.title: The Bank of Japan believes its interest rate hike cycle may be prolonged until interest rates exceed 0.75%.
data.description: Market news: The Bank of Japan believes its interest rate hike cycle may be prolonged until rates exceed 0.75%. The Bank of Japan is still unable to determine the exact level of its neutral interest rate, and (remains) confident that the range of the neutral interest rate will remain wide. (Jinshi)

data.title: Synthetix plans to return to the Ethereum mainnet on December 17th and launch SLP at the same time.
data.description: Decentralized derivatives protocol Synthetix has announced its return to the Ethereum mainnet on December 17th. Synthetix Liquidity Providers (SLPs) will launch at the same time, with access to SLPs using a whitelist system and plans to open them to all users as soon as possible.

data.title: Altcoin Market Shows Early Signs Of A Bottom, Says Michaël Van De Poppe
data.description:
According to crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe, the altcoin market capitalization appears to be forming a bottoming structure after an extended period of weakness. His view is based on the market’s current behavior around a higher-timeframe support zone, as shown in the attached chart.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/altcoin-market-shows-early-signs-of-a-bottom-says-michael-van-de-poppe/

data.title: Binance Alpha lists RAVE
data.description: According to the official page, Binance Alpha has listed RAVE. Contract address: 0x97693439ea2f0ecdeb9135881e49f354656a911c

data.title: Binance: Registered for anti-money laundering services in accordance with Pakistan's regulatory framework.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance has made significant regulatory progress in Pakistan by obtaining Anti-Money Laundering (AML) service registration under the framework of the Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority of Pakistan (PVARA). This allows Binance to prepare for obtaining a full Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) license while providing cross-border services with registered AML certification, thus aligning with Pakistan's regulatory roadmap.

data.title: The Polymarket betting frenzy for the "Time Magazine 2025 Cover of the Year" has concluded, with AI emerging as the winner, attracting over $55 million in funding.
data.description: According to Polymarket, the "Time Magazine 2025 Cover of the Year" betting event has concluded, with AI becoming the cover of the year. The event attracted over $55.28 million in funding, with nearly $4 million betting on AI and other options. Ultimately, the winner took all the winnings from the betting pool.

data.title: Ark Invest spent $15.4 million to buy 124,427 shares of Robinhood stock.
data.description: According to market sources, Ark Invest has spent $15.4 million to buy 124,427 shares of Robinhood stock, and has also increased its holdings in its Bitcoin ETF ARKB by approximately 13,700 shares.

data.title: US SEC Chairman: DTC participants can transfer tokenized securities to other participants' registered wallets.
data.description: Paul Atkins, Chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), stated in an article published on the X platform that the U.S. financial market is about to transition to on-chain and will prioritize innovation and actively adopt new technologies. The SEC has sent a letter to the American Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTC) stating that no action will be taken. On-chain markets will bring investors greater predictability, transparency, and efficiency. Now, DTC participants can directly transfer tokenized securities to the registered wallets of other participants, and these transactions will be recorded and tracked by the DTC.

data.title: Bitwise supports Strategy: MSCI rule changes are depriving investors of digital asset investment opportunities.
data.description: Digital asset management firm Bitwise published a statement on its X platform in support of Strategy, expressing deep disappointment with MSCI's proposed removal of Strategy from its global investable market indices. Bitwise stated that indices aim to faithfully reflect the market, not to assess the merits of specific business models, and should remain neutral. Bitwise believes that exchange-traded products cannot replicate Strategy's operating model, and that Strategy creates value for shareholders. The proposed rule change by MSCI deprives investors of investment opportunities in the digital asset class and its industry leaders, thus disadvantaging them.

data.title: Tether plans to raise up to $20 billion through a stock offering and is considering equity tokenization.
data.description: Tether has disclosed plans to raise up to $20 billion through a stock offering and will consider tokenizing the shares after the sale. Company executives are reportedly considering various options, including stock buybacks and storing the company's shares digitally on a blockchain after the transaction is completed. (Bloomberg)

data.title: The 171st Ethereum consensus layer core developer meeting decided to retain the trust payment function in the Glamsterdam upgrade.
data.description: According to Christine Kim's summary of the 171st Ethereum Consensus Layer Core Developers Meeting (ACDC), the meeting primarily discussed: retaining trust payments as part of the embedded proposer-builder separation (ePBS) in the Glamsterdam upgrade, while formally removing the fork selection mandatory inclusion list (FOCIL) feature. Furthermore, the Fusaka upgrade successfully launched on the mainnet on December 3rd, and the subsequent blob parameter hard fork was successfully activated on December 9th, with stable network operation. The meeting also discussed proposals such as EIP 7688, 8061, and 8080, and plans to begin planning the Heka upgrade in January next year, while also considering renaming it to conform to the standards of the International Astronomical Union.

data.title: Phantom launches prediction markets: Phantom Prediction Markets
data.description: Crypto wallet app Phantom announced the launch of Phantom Prediction Markets, a Kalshi-powered prediction market, on its X platform. This market allows users to participate in predictions across sports, cryptocurrencies, culture, and other fields. The service is expected to be rolled out to eligible users within the next week. Phantom cautions that its prediction market does not cover all jurisdictions, and risks may include, but are not limited to, price volatility, limited liquidity, and potential regulatory changes. Trading in the prediction market may incur transaction fees and other charges, and inaccurate predictions may result in the loss of all funds allocated to a particular activity.

data.description: 1. Sources: The Bank of Japan will pledge further interest rate hikes at its policy meeting next week; 2. Data: 73 projects have raised over $10 million in the past three months, mainly concentrated in prediction markets, payments, and RWA sectors; 3. Kalshi, Crypto.com, Robinhood, Coinbase, and Underdog, five major platforms, jointly established a prediction market alliance, committed to the compliant development of prediction markets; 4. Circle CEO: The market capitalization of the tokenized fund USYC has increased by 737.7% in the past 30 days; 5. Matrixport: Bitcoin exhibits phased adjustment characteristics during the Fed's wait-and-see approach and market pressure; 6. "1011 Insider Whale" continues to increase its long positions, with its ETH holdings now worth nearly $500 million; 7. BGA: Web3 games are shifting towards a sustainable model, and industry confidence and maturity are recovering; 8. China Construction Bank responds to card lockouts due to transfer remarks "Dogecoin": Risk monitoring will be triggered, and account transactions will be restricted; 9. South Korean media: Binance only partially cooperated in freezing Upbit's stolen assets; most of the funds involved in the Solana case have already been laundered. 10. Japan's National Tax Agency: The 2024 cryptocurrency tax investigation recovered 4.6 billion yen in taxes, an increase of more than 30% year-on-year.

data.title: Fidelity executive: BTC is experiencing its fifth wave of price increases; smaller gains and longer durations indicate asset maturity.
data.description: Jurrien Timmer, Global Head of Macro at Fidelity, wrote on the X platform that with the current over-speculation in the crypto market subsiding and market sentiment improving, Bitcoin's ending in 2025 is actually quite promising, especially given the backdrop of the Federal Reserve's accommodative policy and a calm bond and foreign exchange market. Previously, Bitcoin treasury companies offered "yields" by issuing shares to purchase Bitcoin, which may now be a drag on Bitcoin's rise, raising questions about whether another four-year cycle has ended. However, observing the mature network curve structure of Bitcoin reveals that since 2010, Bitcoin has experienced five waves of upward movement, each with a smaller increase but a longer duration. Its performance in the most recent bull market (starting at approximately $16,000 in 2022) demonstrates that Bitcoin has matured considerably. According to the five-wave upward trend chart shared by Jurrien Timmer, the peak price of Bitcoin in the fifth wave may be $151,360.

data.title: Pyth Network announced the establishment of the PYTH Reserve and will use protocol revenue for buybacks.
data.description: At the Solana Breakpoint 2025 conference, Pyth Network announced the establishment of the PYTH Reserve, which will use protocol revenue through a DAO vault to use one-third of its vault for PYTH buybacks each month.

data.title: Earn up to 4.10% annualized return automatically when you hold USDG stablecoin in your OKX account.
data.description: According to the official announcement, from 00:00 on December 11, 2025 to 00:00 on January 11, 2026 (UTC+8), users holding USDG in their OKX funds, trading, and lending accounts will automatically earn an annualized return of up to 4.10% provided by the OKX platform. This return can be withdrawn or used at any time, allowing users to combine trading and wealth management. Users can check their earnings at any time through the OKX APP (version 6.136.10 and above) - Assets - click on USDG. The platform will continue to expand the application of USDG in more trading and wealth management scenarios. It is understood that USDG is issued by Paxos Digital Singapore Pte. Ltd. (PDS) and has been approved by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) to provide digital payment token services as a primary payment institution. This approval allows PDS to issue USDG, a stablecoin that complies with the upcoming stablecoin framework of the MAS.

data.title: Almanak Airdrop Delay: System Error and DDoS Attack
data.description:
Almanak faces operational disruptions, causing token claim delays and wallet issues due to DDoS attack. Token value drops significantly.
source: https://coincu.com/news/almanak-airdrop-system-delay/

data.title: Binance hints at stock perps push to join global tokenized equities race
data.description:
Binance quietly rolled out API endpoints pointing to stock perpetual futures, signaling a renewed push into stock trading after a failed 2021 launch.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/binance-stock-perpetuals-tokenized-equities-api-update?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
